kpi.prompt: Lagerumschlagshäufigkeit pro Jahr: annualisierter Wareneinsatz aus Rechnungen der letzten 12 Monate geteilt durch den durchschnittlichen Bestandswert; ein einzelner Datensatz.
kpi.sql_string:
WITH sales_last_12_months AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(SUM(sii.xen_net_price * sii.quantity), 0) AS goods_issue_value
    FROM summary_invoice_items sii
    JOIN invoices i
      ON sii.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
    WHERE i.date >= DATEADD(month, -12, CURRENT_DATE)
      AND i.status != 'created'
),
inventory_valuation_snapshots AS (
    SELECT
        date,
        SUM(quantity * COALESCE(calculated_purchase_price, latest_purchase_price, inventory_purchase_price, 0)) AS stock_value
    FROM warehouse_values
    WHERE date >= DATEADD(month, -12, CURRENT_DATE)
    GROUP BY date
),
avg_inventory_value AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(AVG(stock_value), 0) AS avg_stock_value
    FROM inventory_valuation_snapshots
)
SELECT
    ROUND(
        CASE
            WHEN a.avg_stock_value > 0 THEN (s.goods_issue_value * 12.0 / 12.0) / a.avg_stock_value
            ELSE NULL
        END,
        2
    ) AS lagerumschlagshaeufigkeit_pro_jahr
FROM sales_last_12_months s
CROSS JOIN avg_inventory_value a
LIMIT 1;

en.title: Inventory turnover
en.description: How often the average stock is sold per year — annualised COGS divided by average stock.

de.title: Lagerumschlag
de.description: Wie oft der mittlere Bestand pro Jahr verkauft wird — annualisierter Wareneinsatz geteilt durch mittleren Bestandswert.
